title: Cheeseworld
summary: A platform game about collecting cheese, leveling up, and dodging a cat and grumpy old man.
description: Move, jump, collect cheese, grab speed boosts, and survive the hazards in this mousey platformer.
dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult preview may be useful for younger players because of cartoon hazards.
safety.notes: Includes chasing and survival-style platformer hazards.
